name: Cheese Wreath
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together until smooth and creamy.
2. Place an upside-down drinking glass in the center of a serving platter.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture around the glass, using all of it.
4. Smooth the mixture into a ring shape, gently removing the glass.
5. Mix the pecans, parsley, and chopped peppers together.
6. Pat this mixture onto the ring until it is completely coated.
7. Chill for at least 4 hours or overnight.
8. Makes one wreath.
